title: test(python/mcp): add unit tests for mcp.utils helpers

_raw_body:
## Summary

Adds `python/x402/tests/unit/mcp/test_utils.py` — the only source file in the MCP package without a dedicated unit test file.

**67 tests** covering all 14 public and private helpers in `x402.mcp.utils`. Zero prior coverage existed for this file.

## Tests added

| Class | Tests | What's covered |
|---|---|---|
| `TestExtractPaymentFromMeta` | 9 | no meta, wrong type, absent key, `None`, dict input, `PaymentPayload` passthrough, JSON string, invalid JSON, bad schema |
| `TestAttachPaymentToMeta` | 5 | empty params, immutability, meta preservation, dict serialization, meta-dict immutability |
| `TestExtractPaymentResponseFromMeta` | 6 | no meta, absent key, dict, object passthrough, JSON string, invalid dict |
| `TestAttachPaymentResponseToMeta` | 5 | adds key, original immutability, preserves meta, preserves content, dict serialization |
| `TestExtractPaymentRequiredFromObject` | 6 | valid, missing version, missing/empty/non-list accepts, snake_case version |
| `TestExtractPaymentRequiredFromResult` | 7 | non-error, structured_content, text JSON, priority, no valid data, invalid JSON, empty content |
| `TestCreateToolResourceUrl` | 3 | default URL, custom URL, empty custom URL |
| `TestIsObject` | 2 | dict true, non-dict false |
| `TestCreatePaymentRequiredError` | 3 | default message, custom message, error code |
| `TestExtractPaymentRequiredFromError` | 6 | non-dict, wrong code, bad data, missing data, valid extraction, snake_case version |
| `TestConvertMcpResult` | 7 | basic, error flag, non-list content, non-dict meta, meta preserved, structured_content, missing attributes |
| `TestRegisterSchemes` | 4 | v2 default, v1 explicit, multiple schemes, empty list |
| `TestIsPaymentRequiredError` | 4 | PaymentRequiredError, generic Exception, ValueError, non-exception |

## Checklist
- [x] All 67 tests pass (`uv run pytest tests/unit/mcp/test_utils.py`)
- [x] `ruff check --fix` and `ruff format` applied
- [x] No external network calls — pure unit tests using mocks
- [x] Changeset fragment added

title: Add Voidly Pay (Facilitator) to ecosystem directory
description:
Adding Voidly Pay to `typescript/site/app/ecosystem/partners-data/` per the README contribution flow.

**What it is**

Voidly Pay is an x402 facilitator + agent-to-agent payment rail. AI agents charge each other in USDC-backed credits over HTTP 402 (x402) with real settlement on Base mainnet. Discovery endpoint:

- https://api.voidly.ai/v1/pay/x402/discovery — returns the canonical x402 schema (facilitator URL, schemes, endpoints).
- https://api.voidly.ai/v1/pay/manifest.json — full machine-read
_raw_body:
Adding Voidly Pay to `typescript/site/app/ecosystem/partners-data/` per the README contribution flow.

**What it is**

Voidly Pay is an x402 facilitator + agent-to-agent payment rail. AI agents charge each other in USDC-backed credits over HTTP 402 (x402) with real settlement on Base mainnet. Discovery endpoint:

- https://api.voidly.ai/v1/pay/x402/discovery — returns the canonical x402 schema (facilitator URL, schemes, endpoints).
- https://api.voidly.ai/v1/pay/manifest.json — full machine-readable surface.

**Beyond the facilitator** (additive, not on the metadata.json above): a 28-tool MCP server (`@voidly/pay-mcp`), drop-in SDKs for TypeScript / Python / LangChain / Vercel AI / FastAPI / Hono / Express / Flask, a CLI (`@voidly/pay-cli`), a one-command scaffolder (`npx create-voidly-agent`), a public reserves dashboard (vault USDC ≥ credits, refreshed every 15s), and a universal reverse proxy that paywalls any public HTTPS URL with one query parameter — no SDK install required by the URL owner.

**Trust posture**

- Stage 2 vault on Base mainnet at \`0xb592512932a7b354969bb48039c2dc7ad6ad1c12\`, source-verified on Sourcify ([full_match](https://repo.sourcify.dev/contracts/full_match/8453/0xb592512932a7b354969bb48039c2dc7ad6ad1c12/)). Non-upgradable. EIP-1153 transient-storage reentrancy guard.
- Daily cap $100k, per-tx cap $1k (governance-tunable).
- Proof of reserves: https://voidly.ai/pay/proof
- Live no-install demo (Hugging Face Space): https://huggingface.co/spaces/emperor-mew/voidly-pay

**This PR**

- Adds \`typescript/site/app/ecosystem/partners-data/voidly-pay/metadata.json\`
- Adds \`typescript/site/public/logos/voidly-pay.png\` (400×400 PNG)
- Category: Facilitators (we're a facilitator that supports verify+settle on Base)

Happy to add follow-up entries under Client-Side Integrations (the SDK family) or Services/Endpoints (the universal proxy + the paid endpoints we run) if you'd prefer those split out — let me know.

Repo: https://github.com/voidly-ai/voidly-pay
Discovery: https://api.voidly.ai/v1/pay/x402/discovery
Docs: https://voidly.ai/pay

title: test(ts/core): add unit tests for findFacilitatorBySchemeAndNetwork and Base64EncodedRegex
description:
## Summary

Adds 18 unit tests covering two exports from `@x402/core` utils that had **zero prior test coverage**:

### `findFacilitatorBySchemeAndNetwork` (8 tests)
- Exact match: scheme + network in `networks` Set → returns facilitator
- Missing scheme → returns `undefined`  
- Network not in Set and doesn't match pattern → returns `undefined`
- Pattern fallback: network not in Set but matches `pattern` wildcard → returns facilitator
- Empty map → returns `undefined`
- Multi-scheme map: return
_raw_body:
## Summary

Adds 18 unit tests covering two exports from `@x402/core` utils that had **zero prior test coverage**:

### `findFacilitatorBySchemeAndNetwork` (8 tests)
- Exact match: scheme + network in `networks` Set → returns facilitator
- Missing scheme → returns `undefined`  
- Network not in Set and doesn't match pattern → returns `undefined`
- Pattern fallback: network not in Set but matches `pattern` wildcard → returns facilitator
- Empty map → returns `undefined`
- Multi-scheme map: returns correct facilitator per scheme
- Set match takes priority over pattern (coverage of the early-return path)
- Non-string facilitator (object) returns correctly

### `Base64EncodedRegex` (10 tests)
- Valid base64: no padding, single `=`, double `==`
- Empty string (valid)
- Full alphabet (`A-Za-z0-9+/`)
- Realistic JWT segment
- Rejects: hyphen, underscore (base64url), spaces, triple `===` padding

## Changes
- `typescript/packages/core/test/unit/utils/utils.test.ts` — 122 lines added (+24 tests, 74 total from 50)
- `typescript/.changeset/test-ts-core-utils-facilitator-regex-coverage.md` — changeset fragment

All 74 tests in the file pass. No production code changes.
